series_metadata.series_description: Health, dental and vision insurance enrollments documentation and verification documents for both employee and eligible dependents (including but not limited to birth, adoption, and marriage certificates; divorce decrees, school enrollment forms, or loss of coverage documentation).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, converted to machine readable or retain for one (1) year after separation. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded or for one (1) year after separation., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Shred
